# Sensitive Words List
# Used by AI content generator to filter prohibited terms
# Update monthly — one word per line

# Absolute claims (advertising compliance)
guaranteed
best
cheapest
number one
#1
number 1
lowest price
unbeatable
unmatched

# Political / geographic sensitivity
Taiwan independence
South China Sea dispute
controversial territory
disputed region

# Fake certifications
FDA approved (only use if actually certified)
UL certified (only use if actually certified)

# Discriminatory language
(keep this list updated with industry-specific terms)
